title: Paranormal Jailbreak -Schooler of deadlock-
overview: The leader of the criminal esper organization P.A.N.D.R.A is imprisoned in the jail for espers, Deadlock. There he meets a man with unusually colored eyes who catches his interest, Andy Hinomiya.

title: The Melody of Assassination -Ghost of WW2-
overview: As Andy begins to familiarize himself within P.A.N.D.R.A, he is given his first mission to assassinate a mafia leader.

title: Cleanliness and Pollution -Queen not a Princess-
overview: P.A.N.D.R.A has kidnapped Princess Sophie a Pro-Esper activist. The plan to do so was formulated by non-other than Yugiri.

title: Absolute Domain -Children Territory-
overview: Hyobu Kyosuke has ordered the Catastrophe back to Japan where they at met with a warm welcome from old friends.

title: Strangers -Portrait of the family-
overview: The crew enjoys some free time shopping. Andy treats Yugiri to a special treat but its cut short when he is visited by B.A.B.E.L with some important information.

title: Darkness, Run -As true as a lie-
overview: Not only is the secret of the Catastrophe is revealed but so has Andy’s hidden agenda. Does he have the power to stand against the Major?

title: ESP Unit Part One -Generation ZERO PART I-
overview: After his father’s death, Baron Tsubomi took in Kyosuke and raised him with his daughter Fujuko, a sensory user. Together with other sensory users they help form Japans first Special ESP Unit.

title: ESP Unit Part Two -Generation ZERO PART II-
overview: Kyosuke has been chosen to represent the E.S.P unit in the Navy war games. The Units future is on his shoulders.

title: Catastrophe -Pandora's box opens-
overview: The American government has made their move with a full on assault against the Catastrophe, but their real intentions are unknown even to their spy; History will repeat itself.

title: The Distant Paradise -Original Sin-
overview: Old foes thought long gone, have been exposed as the mastermind behind the plans to sink the Catastrophe is taking Yugiri. This new information re-ignites the fire in Kyosuke as he shakes off death to get his revenge.

title: The Two Within the Storm -Outlaws-
overview: New York has a new Mayor that is in support of esper relationships, at the same time Hyobu and Andy work their way into the USEI facility only to discover…

title: To The Future -Last Resolution-
overview: Saotome plan is finally coming to fruition and with no one powerful enough to stop it, the world will be saved from Hyobu Kyoskue.
